description: Activate, strengthen and enhance your leg muscles with this pair of Shape-Ups trainers from skechers. With a great mesh, synthetic leather and suede combination upper in attractive colors, these shoes are designed to activate your muscles, enhance maneuverability for a natural gait, and optimize support, flexibility and cushioning. Look super stylish in these comfortable sandal-styled shoes all day long. This pair comes with CD and booklet that provides complete information about the shoe and a fun exercise routine. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for durability and style Velcro closure strap in the midfoot to customise the Fit Padded collar and inner lining for in-step comfort Anti-bacterial sockliner for moisture management and to provide a safe environment for the feet Haul loop for easy on/off and to hang shoes from a backpack Midsole Kinetic Wedge extending from the heel to toe for gradual heel to toe transition, wherein the softer lower layer provides superior cushioning creating natural instability Outsole High density rubber outsole to increase side-to-side stability Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
